title: Am-Tech Folding Saw with D-Handle Soft Grip
features: Foldable for easy, safe carrying and storage
Sharp teeth for fast efficient sawing

Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Box Contains 1 x hand saw
